data.title: Study shows rise in sports betting spending, new tax revenue, public health risks. Conducted by University of Maryland, SMU Cox School of Business, and UC San Diego Rady School of Management.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, a recent research report revealed by the University of Maryland's Robert H. Smith School of Business, alongside collaborators from SMU Cox School of Business and UC San Diego Rady School of Management, indicates a significant transformation in the gambling industry. The study discusses the impact of states swiftly legalizing online sports betting.

data.title: Ripple co-founder Chris Larsen made $26M XRP transfer to Coinbase, totaling $344M in exchanges in 2025.
data.description: Chris Larsen recently sent around $26 million worth of XRP to Coinbase. This brings the total amount of XRP he has moved to exchanges since January 2025 to roughly $40 million. In total, Larsen has transferred $344 million in XRP to exchanges and external wallets this year. While it is uncertain if the assets have been sold, the transactions involved direct transfers to Coinbase and intermediary wallets connected to platforms such as Binance. The details were initially brought to light by DL News. For the complete article, please visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: ICI research shows 401(k) plans have record-low mutual fund expense ratios for another year, benefitting retirement savers.
data.description: A report released by the Investment Company Institute (ICI) in Washington on July 17, 2025, revealed that retirement savers who participate in 401(k) plans experienced historically low average mutual fund expense ratios for yet another year. The ICI's latest study, titled "The Economics of Providing 401(k) Plans," highlights this trend. This demonstrates a positive development for individuals saving for retirement, indicating that the costs associated with investing in these plans have decreased significantly. These findings signify that managing retirement funds through 401(k) plans has become more cost-effective, benefiting savers.

data.title: Governor Whitmer initiates Michigan AAM Initiative, allocates $4.1 million for 4 projects, aiming for innovation and growth.
data.description: Today, Governor Gretchen Whitmer revealed a new executive order creating the Michigan Advanced Air Mobility (AAM) Initiative in Lansing, Michigan. The initiative aims to enhance Michigan's AAM capabilities, guarantee the safe and effective integration of these technologies in both public and private sectors, and position the state's workforce, manufacturers, and infrastructure as key national assets in implementing these technologies. Additionally, four projects have been selected to receive a total funding of over $4.1 million as part of this initiative.

data.title: Bedrock Security names Aug 7 as National Data Security Day and launches the Data Security Heroes awards program.
data.description: Bedrock Security, a prominent data security and management platform based in Menlo Park, California, has introduced National Data Security Day as an official holiday to be observed every year on August 7. In conjunction with this, the company has unveiled the Data Security Heroes awards program to acknowledge the contributions of individuals who are driving innovation, defending against threats, and leading the advancement of digital trust. Nominations for the awards are currently open, and the winners will be revealed during the Black H ceremony.

data.title: Dubai introduces first icon classification for Human-Machine Collaboration in research and publications.
data.description: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, a pioneering initiative has been introduced – the world's first icon classification system for Human-Machine Collaboration in research and publications. This innovative program aims to categorize and highlight the importance of collaborative efforts between humans and machines in various fields. It signifies a significant step forward in acknowledging the role of technology in research.

data.title: Aerospace ceramics market expected to reach $8.2 billion by 2029, growing at 8.0% CAGR from $5.6 billion in 2024. (Characters: 110)
data.description: The market for aerospace ceramics is expected to grow from $5.6 billion in 2024 to $8.2 billion by 2029, with a compound annual growth rate of 8.0%. Aerospace ceramics play a critical role in enhancing aircraft performance through lightweight and high-performance materials, used in commercial aviation, defense, and space sectors. The market is segmented by material composition, such as ceramic matrix composites, oxide ceramics, and non-oxide ceramics. Factors driving market growth include global expansion of air traffic, stricter environmental regulations, demand for ceramic-based coatings, expansion of military and defense programs, and increasing space exploration and satellite deployments. This growth is attributed to the rise in global air travel, environmental concerns, defense investments, and space exploration.

data.title: Valley Towing, started in 1963, now a thriving three-generation company after 62 years, focuses on high towing standards.
data.description: In 1963, the Dyar family kickstarted their business in their garage with just one truck. Fast forward 62 years, and Valley Towing, a company founded by Robert and Karen Dyar, has flourished into a multi-generational enterprise. The company upholds top-notch towing services and customer care standards throughout the state.

data.title: Highmark Health Options and Wayspring partner for SUD outreach in Delaware, engaging 65% of members in treatment. Improving health outcomes.
data.description: A new face-to-face Substance Use Disorder (SUD) outreach model has proven successful in reaching individuals who have been underserved by traditional healthcare, with 65% of participants actively engaged in treatment. This program, which originated from a pre-existing corporate collaboration, has led to significant enhancements in health outcomes for its members. The initiative is currently operating in Wilmington, Delaware as of July 17th.

data.title: PhoneBurner wins 2025 Sammy award for its ARMOR® Caller ID protection platform, highlighting smarter outreach.
data.description: PhoneBurner Inc., the developer of the ARMOR® Caller ID protection and number reputation intelligence platform, was recently awarded for their data-driven approach to enhancing communication strategies. The company, based in Laguna Beach, California, received recognition on July 17, 2025. This acknowledgment highlights the effectiveness of ARMOR® in providing smarter outreach solutions.

data.title: Toll Brothers announces luxury home community opening soon in Bulverde, Texas at 1018 Rapidan Lane, expected to open for sale in fall 2025.
data.description: In Bulverde, Texas, on July 17, 2025, Toll Brothers, Inc. unveiled plans for its upcoming luxury home community, Toll Brothers at Thornebrook. Situated at 1018 Rapidan Lane, this development in the San Antonio area is anticipated to be ready for sale in the fall of 2025. Toll Brothers, known as the primary builder of upscale homes in the nation and traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol TOL, continues to expand its presence with this new community.

data.title: RISE Festival partners with Tao Group Hospitality, introduces The Sanctuary for 10th anniversary, elevating VIP experience in Las Vegas.
data.description: To enhance the RISE Festival experience for its 10th anniversary, The Sanctuary has been introduced - offering luxurious VIP tables with bottle service on elevated viewing terraces. This new addition is set to elevate the festival experience with spacious seating and premium amenities. This latest enhancement aims to provide a more upscale and exclusive setting for attendees, adding to the festival's milestone celebration.

data.title: Elon Musk questions Trump's delay in releasing Epstein files. Only 15% chance Trump will do so, $120,000 in trades made.
data.description: Renowned tech figure Elon Musk recently stirred controversy by questioning the delay of further Jeffrey Epstein-related disclosures, sparking discussions on transparency in influential political and technological circles. Musk's inquiry, posted on X (formerly Twitter), asked about the status of "phase 2," a nod to unmet expectations surrounding the release of additional Epstein-related information pledged by President Donald Trump. Despite Musk's push, Polymarket traders express skepticism regarding Trump's commitment to unveil more Epstein files. Current data from July 17 on the prediction platform reveals a mere 15% likelihood of Trump fulfilling this promise before August, with trading volume exceeding $120,000 and odds decreasing by 4 points in 24 hours. These numbers indicate a growing uncertainty, particularly following previous signals from Trump's supporters. Detailed article accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: SIX MINING upgrades cloud mining platform for efficient, safe, and transparent mining. Users can join mainstream currency mining without owning machines or bearing operation costs. AI-driven system maximizes profits.
data.description: SIX MINING, a top cryptocurrency cloud mining platform, recently completed a major upgrade and introduced a new intelligent cloud mining service system to enhance efficiency, safety, and transparency in mining. The platform offers users "zero threshold, high yield, full custody" cloud mining services for popular currencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin, and Litecoin. Users can participate in mining without buying expensive machines or dealing with high electricity costs by purchasing computing power contracts. The upgrade focuses on AI-driven intelligent mining for maximizing profits, secure custody, and global expansion. The platform's new features include an AI computing power scheduling engine that matches users with the best mining currency and power combination for maximizing profits. This service is available globally and promises daily income settlement.

data.title: Toll Brothers introduces luxury home sites in Point Hope Community, Charleston, SC with coastal designs and amenities.
data.description: A recently established residential community is now offering modern coastal home designs and a wide range of amenities for its residents. The community features cutting-edge architecture and luxurious living spaces. Residents can enjoy various facilities such as swimming pools, fitness centers, and recreational areas. Additionally, the community is planning to build around 300 homes to accommodate a growing number of residents. With its focus on contemporary coastal design and extensive amenities, this new community aims to provide a premium living experience for its inhabitants.

data.title: Elite Aesthetics NYC introduces new facial experience to industry, enhancing effects of Botox, fillers.
data.description: Elite Aesthetics has recently introduced a new line of personalized facials on July 17, 2025, in New York. These facials are tailored to enhance the impact of Botox, fillers, and other aesthetic procedures. Elite Aesthetics aims to enhance beauty by combining these facials with their treatments.
